dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3984 IS: United States Commission on International Religious Freedom Reauthorization Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Budd (for himself, Mr. Coons, Mr. Risch, Mrs. Shaheen, and Mr. Cruz) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Foreign Relations

form.official-title: To authorize a 2-year extension of the United States Commission on International Religious Freedom.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the United States Commission on International Religious Freedom Reauthorization Act of 2026.

section.header: United States Commission on International Religious Freedom

subsection.text: Section 207(a) of the International Religious Freedom Act of 1998 (22 U.S.C. 6435(a)) is amended by striking 2025 and 2026 and inserting 2026 through 2028.
Section 209 of the International Religious Freedom Act of 1998 (22 U.S.C. 6436) is amended by striking September 30, 2026 and inserting September 30, 2028.
